flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at San Bernardino Valley College rose 57% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.1k → $14.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at San Bernardino Valley College rose 33% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at San Bernardino Valley College rose 11% between 2007 and 2010 ($715 → $795).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at San Bernardino Valley College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.2% → 0.0%).
